constitutional_claims: Invariant 10 (fail-closed): trigger raises EXCEPTION on UPDATE/DELETE — no silent bypass
Invariant 11 (mechanical enforcement): immutability enforced at DB layer, not application layer
WS-1.1 substrate: every price observation is captured as an immutable lineage-bearing snapshot
Correction model: corrections append new rows with prior_snapshot_id — never mutate prior snapshots
Gap #6 closed: odds_snapshots provides the immutable truth basis for deterministic replay
